curation.synopsis: Tallarn is dying in poisoned fire. The Iron Warriors have turned the world into one vast attrition slog, and the Imperial Fists know that if the macro-transporter Eagle's Talon makes its planned drop on the southern continent the southern front collapses. Three recon squads - Gamus, Theophon and Arcad - are slipped aboard the traitor vessel with orders to seize her and reverse the tide. Their story is told in fragments: seven vox transmissions recovered from the operation, replayed by a survivor who already knows how it ends. In desperation the strike teams reach for measures that should be unthinkable to any son of Dorn, and pay accordingly.

flags.reason: available source coverage names the Imperial Fists squads (Gamus, Theophon, Arcad) but not individual viewpoint characters with confidence
